__COMMENT: Copy this file to automated_testing_config.json and update the values for your local environment.
__USAGE: All explicit paths may be absolute or relative to the server repo root. If runner_path is empty, it defaults to <client_root>/itm_minimal_runner.py. CLI flags override these values if valid.
__GROUPS: Optional. Add a groups object to override or extend the default groups in automated_tester.py.
